history.title: Hiawatha
history.description: "Hiawatha The Native American honored as a leader of the Iroquois nation in Henry Wadsworth Longfellow's ""The Song of Hiawatha"" is not an actual person, although Hiawatha (c. 1400) has entered American legend as such. Although the legendary Hiawatha is usually cited as a member of the Mohawk tribe
